final:
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire control,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 8'b0;
        end else if (control) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end 
    end

endmodule
